message:
🌱 Add oras: Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an mission (#964)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oras-638-oras-commands-like-attach-discover-and-pull-support-an-option-to-format",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oras: Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an option to format output as JSON",
+    "description": "Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an option to format output as JSON. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oras deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oras version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nhelm list -n oras 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oras installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oras configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oras configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nkubectl get configmap -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oras\n```\n### What is the version of your ORAS CLI\n\nVersion:        0.15.0 Go version:     go1.19 Git commit:     94abaecb072d7c44bf484cb7070db2c94be2a028 Git tree state: clean\n\n### What would you like to be added?\n\nAn option to format output for commands"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an…",
+        "description": ">  are you open to removing the http(s) part for the reference field?\n\n Sounds good if it helps automation.\n\n```\noras attach myreg.azurecr.io/my/repo:tag \\\n      --artifact-type \"example/foo\" logo.jpg:image/jpg \\\n      -o json  \\\n| jq .reference | xargs -n1 oras manifest fetch --output\n```yaml\n{\n  \"referrers\": [\n    {\n      \"digest\": \"sha256:someHash\",\n      \"mediaType\": \"someType\",\n      \"artifactType\": \"someArtifactType\",\n      \"reference\" : \"<myacr>.azurecr.io/my/repo@sha256:someHash\",\n      \"size\": sizeInBytes\n    },\n  ]\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nkubectl get events -n oras --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": ">  are you open to removing the http(s) part for the reference field?\n\n Sounds good if it helps automation.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\n  \"referrers\": [\n    {\n      \"digest\": \"sha256:someHash\",\n      \"mediaType\": \"someType\",\n      \"artifactType\": \"someArtifactType\",\n      \"reference\" : \"<myacr>.azurecr.io/my/repo@sha256:someHash\",\n      \"size\": sizeInBytes\n    },\n  ]\n}",
+        "{\n  \"digest\": \"sha256:someHash\",\n  \"mediaType\": \"someType\",\n  \"artifactType\": \"someArtifactType\",\n  \"reference\" : \"<myacr>.azurecr.io/my/repo@sha256:someHash\",\n  \"files\" : [\n    \"path/to/my/downloaded/artifact.json\",\n    \"path/to/another/downloaded/artifact.json\"\n  ],\n  \"size\": sizeInBytes\n}",
+        "{\n  \"digest\": \"sha256:someHash\",\n  \"mediaType\": \"someType\",\n  \"artifactType\": \"someArtifactType\",\n  \"reference\" : \"<myacr>.azurecr.io/my/repo@sha256:someHash\",\n  \"files\" :  [\n    \"path/to/my/uploaded/artifact.json\",\n    \"path/to/my/other/uploaded/artifact.json\"\n  ],\n  \"size\": sizeInBytes\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oras",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "oras"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/oras-project/oras/issues/638",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/oras-project/oras"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 23,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
